name: Vegetarian Thai Spring Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Vegetable oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu, mushrooms, beans, celery, and carrot into large julienne slices. Chop the green onions.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat. Stir-fry the garlic until it begins to brown. Add the soy sauce, tofu, and all the vegetables except the green onions. Stir-fry for 10 minutes.
3. Turn off the heat and add the green onions.
4. Separate the roll wrappers. Place the wrapper with the narrow side facing you. Put a scant 1/4 cup of filling about one-third from the closest edge. Fold the closest edge to you over the filling, then fold over the left and right edges. Roll up tightly and seal the end using just a touch of water.
5. Repeat these steps for all rolls.
6. Heat the oil in a wok until hot enough for deep frying. Deep fry the rolls on each side until golden brown. Drain and serve hot with cucumber pickle.
